description.from: Restores HP equal to 10% of Max HP to the 4 allies with the lowest HP, and additionally restores 88*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+40.5% ATK HP every 1sec for 10sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
description.to: Heals 4 allies with lowest HP 10% of Max HP, and heals extra ??? HP over 8 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Magic DEF by 50*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 15sec.
description.to: Dispels all negative effects. M.DEF is increased by ??? for 20 sec.

description.from: Deals 88*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+55.8% ATK Magic DMG to enemies within range 10 time, and reduces their ATK Spd by 10% for 10sec.
description.to: Deals a total of ??? M.DMG over 10 attacks to enemies within range. Hit enemies' ATK Spd is reduced by 25%.

description.from: Every 8sec, restores 1000 Mana and 264*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+165.3% ATK HP to 1 ally with the lowest HP.
description.to: Every 7 sec, an ally with the lowest Hp recovers 1 orb of mana and ??? HP.

IV.from: Increases Mana Recovery per sec of the target by 15%.
IV.to: Mana Recovery per sec of the target is increased by 50%.

IV.from: Increases CC Resist by 120 for 15 sec.
IV.to: CC Resist is increased by 250 for 20 sec.
All DMG the target takes is increased by 25%.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and the effect now applies to all allies.
light.to: Mana Cost is increased by 1 and skill effect range changes to all allies.

light.from: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10%.
light.to: Each hit removes 250 mana from the target.

dark.from: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10%.
dark.to: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, Silence enemies in range for 1 sec.

dark.from: Additionally restores 500 Mana to the 2 allies with the highest Attack.
dark.to: Also supplies 1 orb of mana to the ally with the highest ATK.

description.from: [Soulrush] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and heals all allies' HP by {0}% of DMG.
description.to: [Soulrush] Mana cost is reduced by 1 and heals all allies' HP by {0}% of DMG.

dark.from: All allies’ Mana recovery per second increases by 30%, and your cooldown of all skills is reduced by 5%.
dark.to: Upon attacking, there is a 10% chance to reduce all DEF of the target by 20% and reduce all the hero's cooldowns by 5%.

description.from: Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second is increased by 35%.
description.to: Every 20 sec, an ally with the lowest HP turns invisible for {0} sec. An invisible ally becomes immune to P.DMG, and HP will not drop below 1%. MP Recovery per sec is increased to {1}%.
